basic_details.job_title: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers) and Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers) Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi (JK Anganwadi) Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers) and Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers) Notification 2026 has been released on 19 June 2026 on the official website jkicds.com. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the JK Anganwadi Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers) and Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers): 10+2 and maximum graduation. Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers): Matriculation or minimum 8th standard.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JK Anganwadi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers): 10+2 and maximum graduation. Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers): Matriculation or minimum 8th standard.

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the submission of applications for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is 13th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by JK Anganwadi?
faq.answer: JK Anganwadi has released a total of 7 vacancies for the posts of Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers) and Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers) through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: For Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers), candidates need to have completed 10+2 and a maximum of graduation. For Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers), the requirement is Matriculation or a minimum of 8th standard.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between a minimum of 18 years and a maximum of 37 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these Anganwadi posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 will be based on a Merit List followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Sanginis and Sahayikas are on a contractual basis, as indicated in the job type for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the starting date to apply for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The date of commencement for the submission of applications for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is 23rd June 2026.

faq.answer: The last date for the submission of applications for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 is 13th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.
